name: SPACE FX
subtitle: 32-Algorithm Stereo Effects Processor
summary: Stereo multi-effects processor with 32 Klark Teknik DSP algorithms including halls, rooms, plates, spring reverb, shimmer, mono and ping-pong delays, chorus, flanger, and phaser. Mono input, stereo output. PROGRAM knob, two parameter knobs, tap tempo button, and 8-character LED display.
